name: Letterboxd Watchlist Sync
description: Automatically sync your Letterboxd watchlist to a Jellyfin playlist.
overview: A scheduled background task plugin that scrapes your public Letterboxd watchlist and updates a Jellyfin playlist with matched movies by title and production year.

versions.changelog: Robust metadata ID matching (TMDb/IMDb), local cache, config UI dashboard stats, and Sync Now manual trigger.
Initial release of the Letterboxd Watchlist Sync plugin.

name: Letterboxd Ratings
description: Fetches average Letterboxd ratings and applies them to Jellyfin movies.
overview: A metadata provider plugin that scrapes average ratings from Letterboxd for film items in your library using TMDb/IMDb IDs, featuring local caching and request serialization.

versions.changelog: Initial release of the Letterboxd Ratings metadata provider plugin.
